name: Node Exporter Full
description: Linux-focused Prometheus node_exporter dashboard converted from Grafana dashboard 1860 revision 45, with a consolidated App Overview for the Prometheus Observability Demo metrics. Set Job and Instance to match node_uname_info labels; macOS exporters omit many Linux-only panels.

panels.title: Root FS Used
CPU Basic
panels.sql: {"promql":"label_replace((avg(rate(node_cpu_seconds_total{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\", mode=\"system\"}[{{rateInterval}}]))), \"grafana_target\", \"Busy System\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((avg(rate(node_cpu_seconds_total{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\", mode=\"user\"}[{{rateInterval}}]))), \"grafana_target\", \"Busy User\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((avg(rate(node_cpu_seconds_total{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\", mode=\"iowait\"}[{{rateInterval}}]))), \"grafana_target\", \"Busy Iowait\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((avg(sum without(mode) (rate(node_cpu_seconds_total{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\", mode=~\".*irq\"}[{{rateInterval}}])))), \"grafana_target\", \"Busy IRQs\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((avg(sum without (mode) (rate(node_cpu_seconds_total{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\",  mode!='idle',mode!='user',mode!='system',mode!='iowait',mode!='irq',mode!='softirq'}[{{rateInterval}}])))), \"grafana_target\", \"Busy Other\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((avg(rate(node_cpu_seconds_total{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\", mode=\"idle\"}[{{rateInterval}}]))), \"grafana_target\", \"Idle\", \"__name__\", \".*\")","mode":"range","range":"{{range}}"}

panels.title: Memory Basic
panels.sql: {"promql":"label_replace((node_memory_MemTotal_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}), \"grafana_target\", \"Total\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((node_memory_MemTotal_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"} - node_memory_MemFree_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"} - (node_memory_Cached_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"} + node_memory_Buffers_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"} + node_memory_SReclaimable_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"})), \"grafana_target\", \"Used\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((node_memory_Cached_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"} + node_memory_Buffers_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"} + node_memory_SReclaimable_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}), \"grafana_target\", \"Cache + Buffer\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((node_memory_MemFree_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}), \"grafana_target\", \"Free\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace(((node_memory_SwapTotal_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"} - node_memory_SwapFree_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"})), \"grafana_target\", \"Swap used\", \"__name__\", \".*\")","mode":"range","range":"{{range}}"}

panels.title: Disk Space Used Basic
panels.sql: {"promql":"((node_filesystem_size_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\", job=\"{{job}}\", device!~'rootfs'} - node_filesystem_avail_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\", job=\"{{job}}\", device!~'rootfs'}) / node_filesystem_size_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\", job=\"{{job}}\", device!~'rootfs'}) * 100","mode":"range","range":"{{range}}"}

panels.title: CPU
panels.sql: {"promql":"label_replace((sum(rate(node_cpu_seconds_total{mode=\"system\",instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}[{{rateInterval}}])) / scalar(count(count(node_cpu_seconds_total{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}) by (cpu)))), \"grafana_target\", \"System - Processes executing in kernel mode\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((sum(rate(node_cpu_seconds_total{mode=\"user\",instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}[{{rateInterval}}])) / scalar(count(count(node_cpu_seconds_total{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}) by (cpu)))), \"grafana_target\", \"User - Normal processes executing in user mode\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((sum(rate(node_cpu_seconds_total{mode=\"nice\",instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}[{{rateInterval}}])) / scalar(count(count(node_cpu_seconds_total{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}) by (cpu)))), \"grafana_target\", \"Nice - Niced processes executing in user mode\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((sum(rate(node_cpu_seconds_total{mode=\"iowait\",instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}[{{rateInterval}}])) / scalar(count(count(node_cpu_seconds_total{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}) by (cpu)))), \"grafana_target\", \"Iowait - Waiting for I/O to complete\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((sum(rate(node_cpu_seconds_total{mode=\"irq\",instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}[{{rateInterval}}])) / scalar(count(count(node_cpu_seconds_total{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}) by (cpu)))), \"grafana_target\", \"Irq - Servicing interrupts\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((sum(rate(node_cpu_seconds_total{mode=\"softirq\",instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}[{{rateInterval}}])) / scalar(count(count(node_cpu_seconds_total{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}) by (cpu)))), \"grafana_target\", \"Softirq - Servicing softirqs\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((sum(rate(node_cpu_seconds_total{mode=\"steal\",instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}[{{rateInterval}}])) / scalar(count(count(node_cpu_seconds_total{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}) by (cpu)))), \"grafana_target\", \"Steal - Time spent in other operating systems when running in a virtualized environment\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((sum(rate(node_cpu_seconds_total{mode=\"idle\",instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}[{{rateInterval}}])) / scalar(count(count(node_cpu_seconds_total{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}) by (cpu)))), \"grafana_target\", \"Idle - Waiting for something to happen\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((sum by(instance) (rate(node_cpu_guest_seconds_total{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}[{{rateInterval}}])) / on(instance) group_left sum by (instance)((rate(node_cpu_seconds_total{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}[{{rateInterval}}]))) > 0), \"grafana_target\", \"Guest CPU usage\", \"__name__\", \".*\")","mode":"range","range":"{{range}}"}

panels.title: Memory
panels.sql: {"promql":"label_replace((node_memory_MemTotal_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"} - node_memory_MemFree_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"} - node_memory_Buffers_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"} - node_memory_Cached_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"} - node_memory_Slab_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"} - node_memory_PageTables_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"} - node_memory_SwapCached_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}), \"grafana_target\", \"Apps - Memory used by user-space applications\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((node_memory_PageTables_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}), \"grafana_target\", \"PageTables - Memory used to map between virtual and physical memory addresses\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((node_memory_SwapCached_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}), \"grafana_target\", \"SwapCache - Memory that keeps track of pages that have been fetched from swap but not yet been modified\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((node_memory_Slab_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}), \"grafana_target\", \"Slab - Memory used by the kernel to cache data structures for its own use (caches like inode, dentry, etc)\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((node_memory_Cached_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}), \"grafana_target\", \"Cache - Parked file data (file content) cache\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((node_memory_Buffers_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}), \"grafana_target\", \"Buffers - Block device (e.g. harddisk) cache\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((node_memory_MemFree_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}), \"grafana_target\", \"Unused - Free memory unassigned\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace(((node_memory_SwapTotal_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"} - node_memory_SwapFree_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"})), \"grafana_target\", \"Swap - Swap space used\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((node_memory_HardwareCorrupted_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}), \"grafana_target\", \"Hardware Corrupted - Amount of RAM that the kernel identified as corrupted / not working\", \"__name__\", \".*\")","mode":"range","range":"{{range}}"}

panels.title: Network Saturation
panels.sql: {"promql":"label_replace(((node_network_speed_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"} > bool 0) * (rate(node_network_receive_bytes_total{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}[{{rateInterval}}]) / node_network_speed_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"})), \"grafana_target\", \"device - Rx in\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace(((node_network_speed_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"} > bool 0) * (rate(node_network_transmit_bytes_total{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}[{{rateInterval}}]) / node_network_speed_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"})), \"grafana_target\", \"device - Tx out\", \"__name__\", \".*\")","mode":"range","range":"{{range}}"}

panels.title: Pressure Stall Information
panels.sql: {"promql":"label_replace((rate(node_pressure_cpu_waiting_seconds_total{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}[{{rateInterval}}])), \"grafana_target\", \"CPU - Some\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((rate(node_pressure_memory_waiting_seconds_total{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}[{{rateInterval}}])), \"grafana_target\", \"Memory - Some\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((rate(node_pressure_memory_stalled_seconds_total{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}[{{rateInterval}}])), \"grafana_target\", \"Memory - Full\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((rate(node_pressure_io_waiting_seconds_total{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}[{{rateInterval}}])), \"grafana_target\", \"I/O - Some\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((rate(node_pressure_io_stalled_seconds_total{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}[{{rateInterval}}])), \"grafana_target\", \"I/O - Full\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((rate(node_pressure_irq_stalled_seconds_total{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}[{{rateInterval}}])), \"grafana_target\", \"IRQ - Full\", \"__name__\", \".*\")","mode":"range","range":"{{range}}"}

panels.title: Memory Committed
panels.sql: {"promql":"label_replace((node_memory_Committed_AS_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}), \"grafana_target\", \"Committed_AS – Memory promised to processes (not necessarily used)\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((node_memory_CommitLimit_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}), \"grafana_target\", \"CommitLimit - Max allowable committed memory\", \"__name__\", \".*\")","mode":"range","range":"{{range}}"}

panels.title: Memory Writeback and Dirty
panels.sql: {"promql":"label_replace((node_memory_Writeback_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}), \"grafana_target\", \"Writeback – Memory currently being flushed to disk\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((node_memory_WritebackTmp_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}), \"grafana_target\", \"WritebackTmp – FUSE temporary writeback buffers\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((node_memory_Dirty_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}), \"grafana_target\", \"Dirty – Memory marked dirty (pending write to disk)\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((node_memory_NFS_Unstable_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}), \"grafana_target\", \"NFS Unstable – Pages sent to NFS server, awaiting storage commit\", \"__name__\", \".*\")","mode":"range","range":"{{range}}"}

panels.title: Memory Slab
panels.sql: {"promql":"label_replace((node_memory_SUnreclaim_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}), \"grafana_target\", \"SUnreclaim – Non-reclaimable slab memory (kernel objects)\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((node_memory_SReclaimable_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}), \"grafana_target\", \"SReclaimable – Potentially reclaimable slab memory (e.g., inode cache)\", \"__name__\", \".*\")","mode":"range","range":"{{range}}"}

panels.title: Memory Shared and Mapped
panels.sql: {"promql":"label_replace((node_memory_Mapped_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}), \"grafana_target\", \"Mapped – Memory mapped from files (e.g., libraries, mmap)\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((node_memory_Shmem_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}), \"grafana_target\", \"Shmem – Shared memory used by processes and tmpfs\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((node_memory_ShmemHugePages_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}), \"grafana_target\", \"ShmemHugePages – Shared memory (shmem/tmpfs) allocated with HugePages\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((node_memory_ShmemPmdMapped_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}), \"grafana_target\", \"PMD Mapped – Shmem/tmpfs backed by Transparent HugePages (PMD)\", \"__name__\", \".*\")","mode":"range","range":"{{range}}"}

panels.title: Memory LRU Active / Inactive (%)
panels.sql:
{"promql":"label_replace(((node_memory_Inactive_bytes{instance="{{instance}}",job="{{job}}"}) 
/ 
(node_memory_MemTotal_bytes{instance="{{instance}}",job="{{job}}"})), "grafana_target", "Inactive – Less recently used memory, more likely to be reclaimed", "__name__", ".*") or label_replace(((node_memory_Active_bytes{instance="{{instance}}",job="{{job}}"}) 
/ 
(node_memory_MemTotal_bytes{instance="{{instance}}",job="{{job}}"})), "grafana_target", "Active – Recently used memory, retained unless under pressure", "__name__", ".*")","mode":"range","range":"{{range}}"}

panels.title: Memory LRU Active / Inactive Detail
panels.sql: {"promql":"label_replace((node_memory_Inactive_file_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}), \"grafana_target\", \"Inactive_file - File-backed memory on inactive LRU list\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((node_memory_Inactive_anon_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}), \"grafana_target\", \"Inactive_anon – Anonymous memory on inactive LRU (incl. tmpfs & swap cache)\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((node_memory_Active_file_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}), \"grafana_target\", \"Active_file - File-backed memory on active LRU list\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((node_memory_Active_anon_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}), \"grafana_target\", \"Active_anon – Anonymous memory on active LRU (incl. tmpfs & swap cache)\", \"__name__\", \".*\")","mode":"range","range":"{{range}}"}

panels.title: Memory Kernel / CPU / IO
panels.sql: {"promql":"label_replace((node_memory_KernelStack_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}), \"grafana_target\", \"KernelStack – Kernel stack memory (per-thread, non-reclaimable)\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((node_memory_Percpu_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}), \"grafana_target\", \"PerCPU – Dynamically allocated per-CPU memory (used by kernel modules)\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((node_memory_Bounce_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}), \"grafana_target\", \"Bounce Memory – I/O buffer for DMA-limited devices\", \"__name__\", \".*\")","mode":"range","range":"{{range}}"}

panels.title: Memory Vmalloc
panels.sql: {"promql":"label_replace((node_memory_VmallocChunk_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}), \"grafana_target\", \"Vmalloc Free Chunk – Largest available block in vmalloc area\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((node_memory_VmallocTotal_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}), \"grafana_target\", \"Vmalloc Total – Total size of the vmalloc memory area\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((node_memory_VmallocUsed_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}), \"grafana_target\", \"Vmalloc Used – Portion of vmalloc area currently in use\", \"__name__\", \".*\")","mode":"range","range":"{{range}}"}

panels.title: Memory Anonymous
panels.sql: {"promql":"label_replace((node_memory_AnonHugePages_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}), \"grafana_target\", \"AnonHugePages – Anonymous memory using HugePages\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((node_memory_AnonPages_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}), \"grafana_target\", \"AnonPages – Anonymous memory (non-file-backed)\", \"__name__\", \".*\")","mode":"range","range":"{{range}}"}

panels.title: Memory Unevictable and MLocked
panels.sql: {"promql":"label_replace((node_memory_Unevictable_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}), \"grafana_target\", \"Unevictable – Kernel-pinned memory (not swappable)\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((node_memory_Mlocked_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}), \"grafana_target\", \"Mlocked – Application-locked memory via mlock()\", \"__name__\", \".*\")","mode":"range","range":"{{range}}"}

panels.title: Memory DirectMap
panels.sql: {"promql":"label_replace((node_memory_DirectMap1G_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}), \"grafana_target\", \"DirectMap 1G – Memory mapped with 1GB pages\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((node_memory_DirectMap2M_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}), \"grafana_target\", \"DirectMap 2M – Memory mapped with 2MB pages\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((node_memory_DirectMap4k_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}), \"grafana_target\", \"DirectMap 4K – Memory mapped with 4KB pages\", \"__name__\", \".*\")","mode":"range","range":"{{range}}"}

panels.title: Memory HugePages
panels.sql: {"promql":"label_replace(((node_memory_HugePages_Total{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"} - node_memory_HugePages_Free{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}) * node_memory_Hugepagesize_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}), \"grafana_target\", \"HugePages Used – Currently allocated\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((node_memory_HugePages_Rsvd{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"} * node_memory_Hugepagesize_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}), \"grafana_target\", \"HugePages Reserved – Promised but unused\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((node_memory_HugePages_Surp{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"} * node_memory_Hugepagesize_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}), \"grafana_target\", \"HugePages Surplus – Dynamic pool extension\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((node_memory_HugePages_Total{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"} * node_memory_Hugepagesize_bytes{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}), \"grafana_target\", \"HugePages Total – Reserved memory\", \"__name__\", \".*\")","mode":"range","range":"{{range}}"}

panels.title: Memory Pages In / Out
panels.sql: {"promql":"label_replace((rate(node_vmstat_pgpgin{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}[{{rateInterval}}])), \"grafana_target\", \"Pagesin - Page in ops\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((rate(node_vmstat_pgpgout{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}[{{rateInterval}}])), \"grafana_target\", \"Pagesout - Page out ops\", \"__name__\", \".*\")","mode":"range","range":"{{range}}"}

panels.title: Memory Pages Swap In / Out
panels.sql: {"promql":"label_replace((rate(node_vmstat_pswpin{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}[{{rateInterval}}])), \"grafana_target\", \"Pswpin - Pages swapped in\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((rate(node_vmstat_pswpout{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}[{{rateInterval}}])), \"grafana_target\", \"Pswpout - Pages swapped out\", \"__name__\", \".*\")","mode":"range","range":"{{range}}"}

panels.title: Memory Page Faults
panels.sql: {"promql":"label_replace((rate(node_vmstat_pgfault{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}[{{rateInterval}}])), \"grafana_target\", \"Pgfault - Page major and minor fault ops\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((rate(node_vmstat_pgmajfault{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}[{{rateInterval}}])), \"grafana_target\", \"Pgmajfault - Major page fault ops\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((rate(node_vmstat_pgfault{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}[{{rateInterval}}])  - rate(node_vmstat_pgmajfault{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}[{{rateInterval}}])), \"grafana_target\", \"Pgminfault - Minor page fault ops\", \"__name__\", \".*\")","mode":"range","range":"{{range}}"}

panels.title: Time Synchronized Drift
panels.sql: {"promql":"label_replace((node_timex_estimated_error_seconds{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}), \"grafana_target\", \"Estimated error\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((node_timex_offset_seconds{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}), \"grafana_target\", \"Offset local vs reference\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((node_timex_maxerror_seconds{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}), \"grafana_target\", \"Maximum error\", \"__name__\", \".*\")","mode":"range","range":"{{range}}"}

panels.title: PPS Sync Events
panels.sql: {"promql":"label_replace((rate(node_timex_pps_calibration_total{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}[{{rateInterval}}])), \"grafana_target\", \"PPS Calibrations/sec\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((rate(node_timex_pps_error_total{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}[{{rateInterval}}])), \"grafana_target\", \"PPS Errors/sec\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((rate(node_timex_pps_stability_exceeded_total{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}[{{rateInterval}}])), \"grafana_target\", \"PPS Stability Exceeded/sec\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((rate(node_timex_pps_jitter_total{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}[{{rateInterval}}])), \"grafana_target\", \"PPS Jitter Events/sec\", \"__name__\", \".*\")","mode":"range","range":"{{range}}"}

panels.title: System Load
panels.sql: {"promql":"label_replace((node_load1{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}), \"grafana_target\", \"Load 1m\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((node_load5{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}), \"grafana_target\", \"Load 5m\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((node_load15{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}), \"grafana_target\", \"Load 15m\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((count(count(node_cpu_seconds_total{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}) by (cpu))), \"grafana_target\", \"CPU Core Count\", \"__name__\", \".*\")","mode":"range","range":"{{range}}"}

panels.title: Hardware Temperature Monitor
panels.sql: {"promql":"label_replace((node_hwmon_temp_celsius{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"} * on(chip) group_left(chip_name) node_hwmon_chip_names{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}), \"grafana_target\", \"chip_name sensor\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((node_hwmon_temp_crit_celsius{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"} * on(chip) group_left(chip_name) node_hwmon_chip_names{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}), \"grafana_target\", \"chip_name sensor Critical\", \"__name__\", \".*\")","mode":"range","range":"{{range}}"}

panels.title: Time Spent Doing I/Os
panels.sql: {"promql":"label_replace((rate(node_disk_io_time_seconds_total{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}[{{rateInterval}}])), \"grafana_target\", \"device - General IO\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((rate(node_disk_discard_time_seconds_total{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}[{{rateInterval}}])), \"grafana_target\", \"device - Discard/TRIM\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((rate(node_disk_flush_requests_time_seconds_total{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}[{{rateInterval}}])), \"grafana_target\", \"device - Flush (write cache)\", \"__name__\", \".*\")","mode":"range","range":"{{range}}"}

panels.title: Disk Ops Discards / Flush
panels.sql: {"promql":"label_replace((rate(node_disk_discards_completed_total{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}[{{rateInterval}}])), \"grafana_target\", \"device - Discards completed\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((rate(node_disk_discards_merged_total{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}[{{rateInterval}}])), \"grafana_target\", \"device - Discards merged\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((rate(node_disk_flush_requests_total{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}[{{rateInterval}}])), \"grafana_target\", \"device - Flush\", \"__name__\", \".*\")","mode":"range","range":"{{range}}"}

panels.title: Sockstat TCP
panels.sql: {"promql":"label_replace((node_sockstat_TCP_alloc{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}), \"grafana_target\", \"Allocated Sockets\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((node_sockstat_TCP_inuse{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}), \"grafana_target\", \"In-Use Sockets\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((node_sockstat_TCP_orphan{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}), \"grafana_target\", \"Orphaned Sockets\", \"__name__\", \".*\") or label_replace((node_sockstat_TCP_tw{instance=\"{{instance}}\",job=\"{{job}}\"}), \"grafana_target\", \"TIME_WAIT Sockets\", \"__name__\", \".*\")","mode":"range","range":"{{range}}"}

panels.title: TCP Errors

config.description: Prometheus Observability Demo app state and current workload phase.

panels.title: Request Latency
panels.sql: {"promql":"label_replace((histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le, route) (rate(demo_http_request_duration_seconds_bucket[5m])))), \"grafana_target\", \"p50 $1\", \"route\", \"(.*)\") or label_replace((histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, route) (rate(demo_http_request_duration_seconds_bucket[5m])))), \"grafana_target\", \"p95 $1\", \"route\", \"(.*)\") or label_replace((histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, route) (rate(demo_http_request_duration_seconds_bucket[5m])))), \"grafana_target\", \"p99 $1\", \"route\", \"(.*)\")","mode":"range","range":"{{range}}"}

config.description: Synthetic dependency latency that drives degraded modes.
Route volume, status mix, current concurrency, and 5xx ratio.
Synthetic pressure generators for correlating app behavior with node CPU, disk, and memory signals.
